word: G748 - ἀρχιερατικός - archieratikós - ar-khee-er-at-ee-kos' - Of the high-priest

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀρχιερατικός

- Transliteration: Archieratikos

- Phonetic: ar-khee-er-at-ee-kos'

- Definition:

1. high priestly, pontifical

- Origin: from G746 and a derivative of G2413

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G746 and a derivative of G2413; high priestly: - of the high-priest.
